name: climbx-cowork
description: ClimbX companion for Claude Cowork: turn niche outliers into voice-true X posts, schedule and track them, all backed by the ClimbX API.

CLIMBX_API_KEY.title: ClimbX API key
CLIMBX_API_KEY.description: Required. Create one in the ClimbX app under Settings > API (shown once). Stored in the OS keychain. (In plain Claude Code you can instead use the CLIMBX_API_KEY env var or a ~/.climbx/api_key file.)
